subcodes.first_line: O thankful servant of the Lord, the Forgiving! His bounties are boundless and His favours infinite. His tender mercies encompass all [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده شکور رب غفور عنایاتش غیرمتناهی و الطافش بی پایان عواطفش محیط است و
subcodes.subjects: @thankfulness; gratitude, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
